text:
Jupiter. Venus, lord of the 8th from
the Moon is neecha and subject to Papakarthari Yoga.
Mercury the planet of nerves is considerably afflicted.
Throughout Mercury Dasa he was the victim of serious
spermatorrhoea. In Mercury Dasa Venus Bhukti, he had
hydrocele and he was operated upon for this in Mercury
Dasa, Jupiter Bhukti. Mercury as Lagnadhipathi is afflicted
by association with Sun lord of the 3rd and aspected by
Mars lord of the 6th while Jupiter is afflicted by being
aspected by Saturn, lord of the 8th and by Rahu. At the time
of the operation, Saturn was transiting Janma Rasi.
In Venus Dasa, Rahu Bhukti the native had a serious
attack of typhoid. (Chajt No. 115) Venus, the major lord,
owns the Lagna as well as the 6th and occupies the 2nd
with Saturn. Venus and Saturn are almost in conjunction. In
the same Dasa, Saturn Bhukti he had an attack of
bronchitis. Mark the disposition of the 6th lord and Saturn
in Gemini, an airy sign.
In Chart No.
